error_signature: Bad Request: bad webhook: HTTPS url must be provided for webhook
title: Telegram Trigger requires HTTPS webhook URL
symptom: When setting up a Telegram Trigger, n8n throws 'Bad Request: bad webhook: HTTPS url must be provided for webhook'. This indicates that the webhook URL being sent to Telegram is not using HTTPS.
applies_when: n8n is behind a SWAG proxy
not_this_if: n8n is running without a proxy
Webhook URL is correctly set to HTTPS
root_cause: The Telegram API requires that webhook URLs be accessible over HTTPS. When n8n is behind a proxy, it may be sending an internal URL instead of the externally accessible HTTPS URL, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Update the n8n configuration to specify the correct external URL for the webhook.
Ensure that the SWAG proxy is correctly forwarding requests to the n8n container.
Test the webhook URL by accessing it directly in a browser.
agent_instruction: Configure the n8n webhook URL to use the external HTTPS address.
